name: Pork and Apple Salad for 2
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced cooked pork or chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the slivered almonds in a shallow pan at 350°F (175°C) for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown. Alternatively, toast them in a non-stick saucepan on the stove.
2. In a bowl, combine the meat and toasted almonds.
3. Core and thinly slice the apple, then coat with lemon juice. Add the slices to the meat mixture.
4. Stir in the grapes.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, soy sauce, and curry powder until well combined.
6. Pour the dressing over the salad mixture.
7. (Optional) Press the salad into a serving bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 15 minutes before serving.
8. Turn out the salad onto a bed of crisp salad greens.
